description: Technician class definition (Phase 13). Deliberately lower-fidelity than guards: no weapon, no radio-report-on-sight, no alertness ladder. Reference data — not runtime-loaded yet.

movement.fleeSpeedRule: Must exceed Infiltrator sprint (see facility.json infiltrator.moveSpeeds.sprint) — once fleeing, only a tranq dart stops one.

flee.abandonBehavior: Return to base and explicitly report the abandonment; fixture stays broken until a replacement is dispatched.

repair.dispatchModel: Warden clicks a broken fixture from the dispatch panel; no live position feed, only 'in the field'.

delayedReport.firesWhen: fled Technician reaches safety or resumes task

takedown.note: Removed from the available pool silently — a pure drain on Warden repair capacity.

badge.flagExposure: Only the plausibility check (door location vs. last dispatch destination) can expose a looted Technician badge — and a mismatch points near-exactly at the Infiltrator.
